rounds: The purple Country Road bag to the food shop — caught the self-talk live, named it, did it anyway. That one's yours. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed into it in the men's change room — choice made, poncho on, still counts. Round lost on the Apollo ring and necklace at work though — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading as 'obviously gay' — you named it clean, not defensively, but they got that one. Two wins, one loss. You're ahead.
pattern: They're quietest around strangers, loudest where being seen as gay could change how people already see you.
